# Home Miner Service — Quality

**Lane:** `home-miner-service:home-miner-service`
**Slice:** Milestone 1 — Bootstrap
**Status:** Placeholder — Generated by Quality Gate

---

This artifact is regenerated by the Quality Gate on each iteration. Do not hand-edit.

## Quality Gate Checklist

- [ ] All daemon API endpoints implemented and return specified JSON shapes
- [ ] All acceptance criteria from `service-contract.md` verified
- [ ] Thread-safety: `threading.Lock` protects all `MinerSimulator` state mutations
- [ ] Idempotency: start/stop return correct error codes when already in target state
- [ ] State persistence: principal and pairing survive daemon restart
- [ ] Event spine: events append-only, correct format per `EventKind`
- [ ] No external dependencies for core daemon operation
- [ ] LAN-only binding enforced via `BIND_HOST` configuration

## Code Quality Notes

| File | Lines | Assessment |
|------|-------|------------|
| daemon.py | 224 | Clean; clear separation between simulator and HTTP handler |
| cli.py | 262 | Complete CLI coverage for all operations |
| store.py | 143 | Simple JSON persistence; no corruption handling |
| spine.py | 159 | Append-only journal; no deletion or modification |

## Known Limitations

- No TLS on daemon HTTP interface (LAN-only assumption)
- No token-based auth on daemon (capability enforced at CLI layer)
- Simulator uses fixed temperature (45.0°C) — no real sensor data
- No retry or backoff on daemon startup
